name: Green Garlic Soup Au Gratin
recipeInstructions:
1. Remove and discard the upper third of garlic stalks (green leaf ends); thinly slice the bulb.
2. Heat olive oil and 1 tablespoon butter in a saucepan until beginning to foam.
3. Add garlic; sauté 1-2 minutes.
4. Reduce heat, cover tightly, and cook 15-20 minutes, stirring occasionally.
5. Spread bread with 2 tablespoons butter; oven toast until lightly golden.
6. Add broth to garlic, season with salt and pepper, and bring to a boil.
7. Ladle soup into 2 oven-proof serving bowls; top each with toasted bread and grated cheese.
8. Dot each serving with a teaspoon of butter.
9. Bake at 450°F for 10 minutes, until cheese has melted and begun to turn golden.
Per Serving: Calories: 645, Protein: 23g, Carbohydrates: 48g, Fat: 40g, Saturated Fat: 20g, Cholesterol: 79mg, Sodium: 1,466mg, Fiber: 3g.
